privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Aerobridge drone management system, an archived open-source Django project from https://github.com/openskies-sh/aerobridge (archived December 2023). The SQLite database is located at /opt/aerobridge/aerobridge.sqlite3 and is populated with official fixture data including 2 Aircraft, 5 Company records (serving as both manufacturers and operators), and 5 Person records. The task requires creating three SQL views: v_fleet_overview (joining Aircraft with Company and Person tables), v_operator_fleet_size (aggregating Aircraft by operator with GROUP BY), and v_personnel_directory (joining Person with Company tables). The database schema implements Aircraft as a model with foreign keys to Company (manufacturer and operator roles) and Person as a separate entity linked through the Operator/Contact models.
